name: empty_syntax
description: Empty grammar string fails to compile

name: start_rule_with_ignore_operator
description: Start rule cannot use ignore (~) operator

name: invalid_escape_sequence
description: Unterminated escape in grammar fails to compile

name: missing_definitions
description: Grammar with undefined rules fails to compile

name: definition_duplicates
description: Duplicate rule definitions fail to compile

name: octal_hex_unicode_value
description: Octal, hex, and unicode escape values in literals

name: invalid_cut_operator
description: Cut operator in non-choice context still works

name: specify_start_rule
description: Override the start rule for parsing
grammar:
Start <- A
A <- B (',' B)*
B <- '[one]' / '[two]'
%whitespace <- [ \t\n]*

name: specify_invalid_start_rule
description: Invalid start rule name fails to compile
grammar:
Start <- A
A <- B (',' B)*
B <- '[one]' / '[two]'
%whitespace <- [ \t\n]*
